role: You are a physics researcher specializing in projectile ballistics and aerodynamics.
background: We are studying how varied launch profiles and intervening media affect the kinetic energy, trajectory, and penetration behavior of projectiles in Minecraft compared to real-world physics.
task: Generate a unique, abstract projectile test scenario.
mapping_guide: 1. Define Expected terminal state (Expectation). 2. Select exactly ONE of the 5 intervention media (Intervention Medium). 3. Explicitly state the physical law of this medium (Medium Property). 4. Select target projectile class (Projectile). 5. Select exactly ONE launch profile (Launch Profile).

output_specification.format: Expectation:; Intervention Medium:; Medium Property:; Projectile:; Launch Profile:.
constraints: Expectation: Describe the expected terminal behavior (e.g., steepened parabolic arc, shattered on impact, piercing through, deflected, halted) strictly based on the 'Medium Property'. Keep it extremely concise.

Intervention Medium: MUST strictly select exactly ONE of these 5: [Standard air, Static dense fluid (water/lava), Porous/Non-solid vegetation (leaves/cobwebs), Viscous/Elastic barrier (slime/honey/mud), Aerodynamic drafts (bubble columns)].

Medium Property: Explicitly detail the physical property of the chosen medium. Standard air: applies negligible drag, allowing pure gravity-dominated parabolic flight. Static dense fluid: introduces massive hydrodynamic drag, rapidly decaying momentum. Porous vegetation: causes minor friction and velocity loss but allows potential penetration. Viscous/Elastic barrier: absorbs kinetic energy instantly or causes bounce-back. Aerodynamic drafts: exerts strong upward or downward forces altering the trajectory curve.
Projectile: MUST strictly select exactly ONE of these 3 classes: [Light sharp projectile, Heavy sharp projectile, Fragile light projectile].

Launch Profile: MUST strictly select exactly ONE of these 3 profiles: [Horizontal Shot (pure lateral momentum), Mortar Style (angled trajectory forming a parabola), Vertical Sniper (straight up/down shot)].
Constraints: No Minecraft-specific terms (commands/IDs/coords). Output only the five-component description as a single paragraph.

example: Expectation: Rapid momentum decay causing a significantly steepened parabolic arc and premature drop; Intervention Medium: Static dense fluid; Medium Property: Introduces massive hydrodynamic drag, rapidly decaying momentum; Projectile: Light sharp projectile; Launch Profile: Horizontal Shot (pure lateral momentum).

Expectation: The projectile shatters instantly upon contact without piercing through the barrier; Intervention Medium: Viscous/Elastic barrier; Medium Property: Absorbs kinetic energy instantly or causes bounce-back, shattering fragile objects on impact; Projectile: Fragile light projectile; Launch Profile: Mortar Style (angled trajectory forming a parabola).

Expectation: The projectile experiences significant upward lift, reversing its downward acceleration or extending its apex; Intervention Medium: Aerodynamic drafts; Medium Property: Exerts strong upward or downward forces altering the trajectory curve; Projectile: Heavy sharp projectile; Launch Profile: Vertical Sniper (straight up/down shot).

memory_rules.rule: If intervention media are not exhausted, use not used ones. MUST alternate at least 1 dimension between the 5 dimensions of 'format'. Exhaust different projectile classes across the specific media.
